title: Vanilla Veins
description: [CustomOreVeins] adds huge veins for all vanilla ores
body:
Adds large veins for all vanilla ores using the [CustomOreVeins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-ore-veins) mod.

Iron and Copper veins are vanilla features.

This datapack will have no effect if you don't have that mod.
